warnings.text: In most of Muntenia, in Dobrogea, southwest and south of Moldova, there will be periods of atmospheric instability that will manifest itself through torrential showers, lightning, wind intensification, in places wind gusts (speeds of 50...70 km/h) and small and medium-sized hail. In short intervals of time (1...3 hours) or through accumulation there will be quantities of water of 15...25 l/m² and isolated over 30...40 l/m².
warnings.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload
affected_provinces: Arges, Bacau, Braila, Bucharest, Buzau, Calarasi, Constanta, Dâmbovita, Galati, Giurgiu, Ialomita, Ilfov, Prahova, Teleorman, Tulcea, Vrancea

In short intervals of time (1...3 hours) or through accumulation there will be quantities of water of 15...25 l/m² and isolated of over 30...40 l/m².

warnings.text: In the counties of Cluj, Alba, Hunedoara, Vâlcea, Argeș, Dâmbovița, Prahova, Buzău, Vrancea, Bacău, Neamț and Suceava and in the mountain area of the counties of Harghita, Covasna, Brașov, Sibiu and Gorj, there will be periods of accentuated atmospheric instability that will manifest itself through torrential showers, quantitatively important, intensification of winds and storms with gusts of 70...90 km/h and isolated medium-sized hail.
